name: get_venue
description: List upcoming bookable slots at a single venue, identified by its venue_slug (as returned by search_slots). Use to drill into one venue after a search.

name: create_alert
description: Set up an email alert for the user: LayUp watches for NEW matching slots (e.g. a cancellation freeing up a peak court) and emails them when one appears. Use when the user can't find a slot now and wants to be notified, or asks to 'monitor'/'watch'/'let me know when'. Requires their email. A confirma

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.layupsport.com" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_alert · Public sink: create_alert.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_alert · Public sink: create_alert

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
